Marc Solé Domènech

Product Management Leadership

I lead product teams to build things people actually want. My work sits at the intersection of strategy, execution, and people — figuring out what to build, why it matters, and how to get it shipped.

I'm passionate about clarity — in roadmaps, in communication, in decisions. I write here to think out loud about product, leadership, and the craft of building great teams.
